title: pqc-bench: homogeneous-stack post-quantum cryptography benchmarks
description: Reproducible benchmarks of NIST post-quantum signatures and KEMs against real protocol budgets on one homogeneous OpenSSL 3.5 + liboqs stack. First domain: IEC 61850 GOOSE (3 ms TT6 transfer time and a single non-fragmented Ethernet frame), measured on x86, Cortex-A72, and the Cortex-M protection spectrum (M0+/M4F/M7), with per-iteration raw samples for every number.
